title: Paul Youll
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Person

|name=Paul Youll
|birth=[[June 8]], [[1960s|1965]]<ref name="TEGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>
|death=

'''Paul Youll''' is an artist and illustrator who specializes in science fiction and fantasy. He created the cover illustrations for the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|X-Wing]] series as well as [[Tales from the New Republic]], the original paintings of which are now owned by [[George Lucas]].<ref name="Paul Youll">{{WebCite|url=http://www.paulyoull.com/paulyoull.com/GALLERY/Pages/Star_Wars.html|text=Star Wars|work=paulyoull.com|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/YmXVF}}</ref> Youll lives in the [[Wikipedia:United Kingdom|United Kingdom]].

His twin brother [[Stephen Youll|Stephen]], with whom he has collaborated, has also been the cover artist for several ''[[Star Wars]]'' books.

{{Artist-stub}}

==Star Wars bibliography==
[[File:XWIsardsRevenge.jpg|thumb|180px|Paul Youll's cover for ''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'']]

*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|X-Wing]] series
**[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron|''Rogue Squadron'']] - [[1995]]
**[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble|''Wedge's Gamble'']] - 1995
**[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap|''The Krytos Trap'']] - [[1996]]
**[[X-Wing: The Bacta War|''The Bacta War'']] - 1996
**[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron|''Wraith Squadron'']] - [[1997]]
**[[X-Wing: Iron Fist|''Iron Fist'']] - 1997
**[[X-Wing: Solo Command|''Solo Command'']] - 1997
**[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge|''Isard's Revenge'']] - [[1999]]
**[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar|''Starfighters of Adumar'']] - 1999
*''[[Tales from the New Republic]]'' - [[1998]]
*''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' - [[2012]]
*''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' - 2012
*''[[Scoundrels]]'' - [[2013]]
